behavior_summary: U8P_EWBPAINT::look is a simple U8P_EWBPAINT::look/examine handler that displays a single short descriptive bark: "painting " and then suspends/ends the U8P_EWBPAINT::look process.
No branching, no state changes, no external calls, and no global flags are read or written — the routine is purely informational.
The presence of a suspend/terminate node indicates the process yields/completes immediately after showing the description.
notable_control_flow: U8P_EWBPAINT::look -> emit bark "painting " -> suspend/terminate the U8P_EWBPAINT::look process
No conditional branches, menus, or calls to other functions are present in the canonical flow
Two low-confidence raw/unknown nodes appear in the source (literal tokens like '{' and 'suspend') but they do not change observed behavior
open_questions: Is the trailing space in the bark text "painting " intentional (label formatting) or an artifact of extraction?
